retrieved_result: How to "How to Setting up my mobile phone for Exchange email Want to set up your mobile phone for Exchange email? It's easy, but remember you need to set up your mobile phone for internet before you can use this function. Tap Apps. Tap Email. Key in your email address. Tap Password and key in the password.
Decision_Reason: The content describes setting up Exchange email on a mobile device, not Docker or container setup; therefore not relevant to the query.
